nasb.text: He said, “Naked I came from my mother’s womb, And naked I shall return there. The Lord gave and the Lord has taken away. Blessed be the name of the Lord.”

esv.text: And he said, “Naked I came from my mother’s womb, and naked shall I return. The Lord  gave, and the Lord has taken away; blessed be the name of the Lord.”

cnv.text: 說： “我赤身出於母胎， 也必赤身歸去。 賞賜的是耶和華，收回的也是耶和華； 耶和華的名是應當稱頌的。”

ccb.text: 说：“我从母腹赤身而来，也必赤身而去。赏赐的是耶和华，收回的也是耶和华。耶和华的名当受称颂！”
